name: qp_termq_1000
drl:
rule "R0"
salience -10
when
    T1($a0 : f0)
    T1(f0 == 777777, $b0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1 : T0($b1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1($b1, "beta"));
    insert(new T1($b1, "a"));
end
rule "R4"
salience($a4 - $b4)
when
    T1($a4 : f0)
    T1(f0 == 777777, $b4 : f0)
    exists(T1(f0 == 888888) and not(T1(f0 < -3)))
then
end
